title.rendered: [Free Webinar] Stop Counting, Start Planning: How to Track & Use Nonprofit KPIs

content.rendered:
Date: Wednesday, February 25, 2026
Time: 1 pm ET / 10 am PT (1 hour)
Cost: Free
Presented by: Abby Jarvis, Researcher, Writer, & Speaker at Neon One

Measuring key performance indicators (KPIs) will help you track everything from how you’re engaging your community to the effectiveness of your fundraising campaigns. But choosing what to measure and what to skip—and then figuring out how to get the right data—can be hard.

Where do you start?

Join this free webinar for a no-nonsense look at nonprofit KPIs. You’ll learn:

  • An introduction to common nonprofit KPIs and why they’re useful (or not useful)
  • Insight into how you can track and use those KPIs in your own work
  • Ideas for even more in-depth metrics you may want to track in the future

If you’re looking for insight into how you can use your data to drive your planning, fundraising, and community engagement, this webinar is for you!

 Register Now!

Please Note: This webinar will be recorded. If you can not attend the webinar live, you will be sent a link to the recording within 48 hours after the webinar is over. Visit GoToWebinar’s Attendee System Check for information on how to join and attend this webinar.
